login.heading: Welcome back
login.subheading: Sign in to your CCMS account to continue.

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid badge number or password. Please try again.
errors.accountLocked: Your account is locked. Please contact your administrator.
errors.rateLimited: Too many failed attempts. Account locked for {minutes} minute(s).
errors.inactiveAccount: Your account is inactive. Please contact support.
errors.networkError: Cannot reach the server. Please try again.
errors.serverError: Unable to sign in right now. Please try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

logout.confirmDescription: You will be signed out of this session. Any unsaved changes will be lost.
logout.successMessage: You have been signed out successfully.

forgotPassword.heading: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subheading: Enter your registered email address and we will send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account exists for {email}, a password reset link has been sent. Check your inbox and spam folder.

errors.emailNotFound: No account found with this email address.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
errors.networkError: Cannot reach the server. Please try again.
errors.serverError: Unable to send the reset link. Please try again.

resetPassword.heading: Set a new password
resetPassword.subheading: Choose a strong password for your account.
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been changed successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidTokenDescription: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Reset links are valid for 60 minutes.

errors.tokenInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
errors.networkError: Cannot reach the server. Please try again.
errors.serverError: Unable to reset your password. Please try again.

session.idleWarningDescription: You will be automatically signed out in {minutes} minute(s) due to inactivity.
session.autoLogoutMessage: You were signed out due to inactivity.
